reasoning:
On 2025-11-09, Wei Yi's FIDE rating according to the Wikipedia page will be 2753 (based on the November 1, 2025 update). For the rating to be at least 1% higher, it would need to increase by roughly 28 points, reaching at least 2781. 
For the first resolution date (2025-11-16), FIDE rankings update monthly, meaning the November 1 list will still be active and Wikipedia's page will almost certainly still show 2753. Since 2753 is not at least 1% higher than 2753, it is effectively impossible for this to resolve YES. I assign the minimum allowable probability of 0.05.
For the second resolution date (2025-12-09), a jump of 28 points in a single month at the Super GM level (2750+ Elo) requires a historically dominant classical performance (approximately +6 or +7 against elite opposition). This is extremely rare, so the probability remains very low at 0.06.
For the third resolution date (2026-02-07), three FIDE lists will have passed, giving him slightly more time (including potentially playing at Tata Steel). However, gaining 28 points within 3 months to reach 2781 is still a massive undertaking that would likely place him in the world top 5, which is highly improbable though slightly more possible than in one month. I assign 0.09.
